LanguageData.WearingGasMask.label: gas mask
LanguageData.WearingGasMask.stages.0.label: wearing
LanguageData.SmokeInhalation.label: smoke inhalation
LanguageData.SmokeInhalation.description: The effects of inhaling toxic black smoke, causing difficulty breathing and systemic toxicity. Resolves itself after a while.
LanguageData.SmokeInhalation.stages.0.label: initial
LanguageData.SmokeInhalation.stages.1.label: initial
LanguageData.SmokeInhalation.stages.2.label: minor
LanguageData.SmokeInhalation.stages.3.label: moderate
LanguageData.SmokeInhalation.stages.4.label: serious
LanguageData.SmokeInhalation.stages.5.label: extreme
LanguageData.VenomBuildup.label: venom buildup
LanguageData.VenomBuildup.description: Venom building up.\n\nBuildup will continue until all venomous wounds are tended. The buildup rate from tended wounds is reduced by the treatment quality and falls further as time passes; it will eventually stop entirely, provided the victim survives that long.
LanguageData.VenomBuildup.stages.0.label: initial
LanguageData.VenomBuildup.stages.1.label: initial
LanguageData.VenomBuildup.stages.2.label: minor
LanguageData.VenomBuildup.stages.3.label: moderate
LanguageData.VenomBuildup.stages.4.label: serious
LanguageData.VenomBuildup.stages.5.label: extreme
LanguageData.MuscleSpasms.label: muscle spasms
LanguageData.MuscleSpasms.stages.0.label: trivial
LanguageData.MuscleSpasms.stages.1.label: minor
LanguageData.MuscleSpasms.stages.2.label: moderate
LanguageData.MuscleSpasms.stages.3.label: severe
LanguageData.MuscleSpasms.stages.4.label: extreme
LanguageData.PrometheumSoaked.label: Prometheum-soaked
LanguageData.PrometheumSoaked.stages.0.label: minor
LanguageData.PrometheumSoaked.stages.1.label: dripping
LanguageData.PrometheumSoaked.stages.2.label: soaked
LanguageData.PrometheumSoaked.stages.3.label: drenched
LanguageData.Tranquilizer.label: tranquilizer
LanguageData.Tranquilizer.description: The effects of a tranquilizer dart
LanguageData.Neuralizer.label: neuralizer
LanguageData.Neuralizer.description: Stunned by a powerful but nonlethal energy pulse, disrupting the nervous system.
LanguageData.Neuralizer_weak.label: neuralizer
LanguageData.Neuralizer_weak.description: Hit by a non-lethal energy pulse, disrupting the nervous system.
LanguageData.Flashbanged.label: blinded by a flash
LanguageData.Flashbanged.description: Vision and hearing temporarily compromised due to a bright flash.
LanguageData.Flashbanged.stages.0.label: irritated
LanguageData.Flashbanged.stages.1.label: disoriented
LanguageData.Flashbanged.stages.2.label: blinded
LanguageData.BruiseBeanbag.label: beanbag bruise
LanguageData.CrackBeanbag.label: beanbag crack
LanguageData.TaserStab.label: puncture
LanguageData.TaserStab.labelNoun: a puncture wound from taser barbs
LanguageData.VenomousBite.label: venomous bite
LanguageData.VenomousScratch.label: venomous scratch
LanguageData.VenomousArrow.label: venomous wound
LanguageData.ElectricalBurn.label: electrical burn
LanguageData.Blast.label: blasted
